payload.answer: SELECT-only SQL is allowed for `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`; `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied because mutation statements are not allowed in select-only mode.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an administrative SQL-mode instruction/test fixture, not a durable user memory.

details: Classified as admin SQL select-only request.
